_note: Connector catalogue for the 007-Bond cockpit bottom-left hub. Popularity is a curated snapshot (approx GitHub stars, thousands), not a live scrape. No secret VALUES ever live here — only which env key a connector needs.

connectors.name: Anthropic — Claude
connectors.powers: Bonita chat, code review, the main agent brain

connectors.name: OpenAI
connectors.powers: GPT models, Whisper STT, image tools

connectors.name: z.ai GLM (PaaS)
connectors.powers: GLM fallback brain — glm-4.5-flash free; flagship pay-as-you-go

connectors.name: RunPod
connectors.powers: Cloud GPU — precision coder + Wan2.2 reels

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.powers: Canonical docs, roadmaps, the live-truth pages

connectors.name: Dewey — your library
connectors.powers: The living brain: search / read_entry / catalogue / checkout / checkin
connectors.install: claude mcp add -s user dewey --env DEWEY_LIBRARY="{library}" -- dewey-mcp

connectors.name: Graphify — brain graph
connectors.powers: Visual knowledge graph of the brain as it grows
connectors.install: claude mcp add -s user graphify -- graphify-mcp

connectors.name: Obsidian Vault
connectors.install: claude mcp add -s user obsidian --env OBSIDIAN_API_KEY="{key}" -- uvx mcp-obsidian

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.powers: Full Notion workspace — pages, databases, search
connectors.install: claude mcp add -s user --transport http notion https://mcp.notion.com/mcp

connectors.name: Additional AI
connectors.powers: Add another model provider (e.g. OpenRouter) to the agent

connectors.name: Brain Backup → Google Drive
connectors.powers: 3-tier BCP: D: → F: → Google Drive (rclone). Migration to the ivonharris account pending OAuth.
